name: CLC Summer 2026 — Unit Head daily
description: TODO(BRENT): Replace placeholder prompts with approved UH reflection questions. Story 16 criterion 7 (structured 'Bunk concerns' field referencing AssignmentGroups) is deferred; for now bunk_concerns is captured as free text.

prompts.en: [PLACEHOLDER] How is your unit doing today overall? Energy, behavior, group dynamics.
[PLACEHOLDER] Any bunks you're keeping an eye on? Name the bunk(s) and what you're noticing. (Structured bunk-reference UI coming in a later release.)
[PLACEHOLDER] How are your counselors doing? Anyone you're supporting more closely this week?
[PLACEHOLDER] What is your top priority for tomorrow?
